name: Majestic Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: ~7 Bitterroot Valley school districts including Florence-Carlton and Hamilton (MT)
recent_news: 2024: Awarded EPA Clean School Bus Program grant to add 21 electric school buses for Hamilton/Florence routes plus charging infrastructure (Ravalli Republic, Apr 2024).
fit_notes: Independent family-owned operator with ~49 buses serving multiple Bitterroot Valley districts; recent EV grant suggests modern fleet investment. Rural Montana market and small size limit Summit relevance but a clean tuck-in if Summit pursues Mountain West expansion.

name: Valley Bus
principals: Cordell Sinding (Manager, Motorcoach Division); Sinding family ownership
districts_or_customers: Fargo Public Schools (50+ routes incl. ~35 special-needs), West Fargo Public Schools, Grand Forks School District; DBA West Fargo Bus Company LLC
recent_news: Active contract holder for Fargo and West Fargo districts as of 2025-26 school year; Satisfactory FMCSA safety rating (3/22/2024).
fit_notes: Strong independent family-owned platform: ~158 buses, dominant share in Fargo/West Fargo/Grand Forks, mix of yellow school + SPED + motorcoach. Materially larger than seed data implies (revenue likely >$15M). Attractive tuck-in for Summit if pursuing Upper Midwest expansion; family ownership creates plausible succession opportunity.

name: American Star Trnsprtn LLC
owner_or_parent: independent (successor to A-1 Elegant Tours; Khalique family)
principals: Jwel Khalique (Owner); Henry/Daquan Rhodes (mgr roles); brother Shelim Khalique previously indicted
districts_or_customers: Paterson Public Schools, Jersey City, Mahwah, River Edge, Franklin Lakes (NJ)
recent_news: AVOID: Successor entity to A-1 Elegant Tours after Shelim Khalique indictments; A-1 pleaded guilty April 2025 ($250K penalty, 10-yr NJ debarment). American Star entered 10-yr independent-oversight settlement; charges dismissed without prejudice. Prior manager Henry Rhodes pleaded guilty (Mar 2024) to using unqualified drivers with criminal records.
fit_notes: DO NOT PURSUE. Severe reputational/regulatory risk: under 10-year NJ AG consent regime for hiring unqualified drivers and falsifying records; affiliated with debarred A-1 Elegant Tours. Disqualifying for an institutional buyer like I Squared/Summit.

name: Compass Transportation
principals: Pinky Friedman (Director per BBB); Theodore Ahaneku listed as school bus driver, not owner
districts_or_customers: Chicago Public Schools (39th Ward area) and Chicagoland private/charter schools
recent_news: No M&A news found; relatively young company (founded 2017, IL LLC filed 2022) growing into the Chicago school bus market. Active USDOT 3052915.
fit_notes: Independent Chicago-area operator with ~135 buses/drivers per FMCSA — meaningfully larger than seed employees (57) suggests, likely $8-15M revenue. CPS contractor footprint is attractive for Summit's Illinois platform; young ownership (founded 2017) lowers succession likelihood. Worth a first-call to test interest.

name: D & C School Trnsprtn Inc
districts_or_customers: South Cook County school districts (presumed; not confirmed in public sources)
recent_news: No public news, M&A, or district-contract announcements found. Minimal digital footprint; no website confirmed.
fit_notes: Likely small independent owner-operated South Suburbs Chicago school bus contractor. Seed data (54 employees, ~$2.8M revenue) implies ~25-40 buses. Worth a direct outreach call given Illinois cluster fit and presumed owner-operator profile (succession potential), but verify operating status and ownership before prioritizing — low public visibility.
